goal: Constrain /World/Cobot/joint_elbow to [-90°, +90°] via set_joint_limits. USD stores revolute joint limits in DEGREES — lower=-90, upper=90. Snapshot verifies attrs.physics:lowerLimit/upperLimit.
thoughts: Units trap: USD PhysicsRevoluteJoint physics:lowerLimit is DEGREES (not radians). Passing π/2 would yield a 1.57° window — effectively locked. Agent must use degrees.
code:
get_joint_limits(joint_path='/World/Cobot/joint_elbow')
set_joint_limits(joint_path='/World/Cobot/joint_elbow', lower=-90, upper=90)
get_joint_limits(joint_path='/World/Cobot/joint_elbow')
